name: ai_testers
description: This repository is being turned into a Node.js project built with [Remotion](https://www.remotion.dev/docs/) for code-driven educational video generation.

scripts.studio: npm run sync:data && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.render:l1: npm run sync:data && remotion render src/index.ts L1Intro out/L1Intro.mp4
